scripts.build: pnpm run build:core && pnpm run build:engine && pnpm run build:editor && pnpm run build:react && pnpm run build:collab
scripts.build:core: pnpm exec sh -lc 'cd packages/whiteboard-core && tsup --config tsup.config.ts'
scripts.build:engine: pnpm exec sh -lc 'cd packages/whiteboard-engine && tsup --config tsup.config.ts'
scripts.build:editor: pnpm exec sh -lc 'cd packages/whiteboard-editor && tsup --config tsup.config.ts'
scripts.build:react: pnpm exec sh -lc 'cd packages/whiteboard-react && tsup --config tsup.config.ts'
scripts.build:collab: pnpm exec sh -lc 'cd packages/whiteboard-collab && tsup --config tsup.config.ts'
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:core && pnpm run typecheck:engine && pnpm run typecheck:editor && pnpm run typecheck:react && pnpm run typecheck:collab
scripts.test: pnpm run test:core && pnpm run test:engine && pnpm run test:editor && pnpm run test:react && pnpm run test:collab
scripts.verify: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test
